mission.title: ollama: Issue with Ollama Model Download: Progress Reverting During Download
mission.description: Issue with Ollama Model Download: Progress Reverting During Download. This issue affects 32+ users.

steps.title: Identify ollama troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your ollama installation:
```bash
ollama --version
ollama list
```
Look for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review ollama configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant ollama configuration:
### What is the issue?

While downloading models using `ollama run <model_name>`, the progress often reverts—sometimes after 10-12% or even after 60%. The total download size also decreases before continuing.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Issue with Ollama Model Download: Progress Reverting During…
steps.description:
dd20bb891979d25aebc8bec07b2b3bbc.r2.cloudflarestorage.com has always been a problematic host.  I've seen speculation that this also hosts content that occasionally falls afoul of copyright laws and that some ISPs block/limit connections to that server.

What does the following do:
```console
curl
```yaml
time=2025-01-19T16:09:54.920+03:30 level=INFO source=download.go:370 msg="170370233dd5 part 11 stalled; retrying. If this persists, press ctrl-c to exit, then 'ollama pull' to find a faster connection."
```

steps.title: Confirm Issue with Ollama Model Download: Progress… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Test ollama to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
dd20bb891979d25aebc8bec07b2b3bbc.r2.cloudflarestorage.com has always been a problematic host.  I've seen speculation that this also hosts content that occasionally falls afoul of copyright laws and that some ISPs block/limit connections to that server.

What does the following do:
```console
curl -#L -C - -o sha256-[<sha256-hash>]
codeSnippets: time=2025-01-19T16:09:54.920+03:30 level=INFO source=download.go:370 msg='170370233dd5 part 11 stalled; retrying. If this persists, press ctrl-c to exit, then ollama pull to find a faster connection.'

#!/bin/sh
while true; do
timeout 10s ollama pull <model-name>
done

prerequisites.description: A working ollama installation or development environment.
